title: WVL Owner Mode Upgrade — Project Report
scope: Full upgrade of the Women's Viperball League (WVL) from thin spectator experience to robust Owner Mode dynasty.

rationale.item: The entire season simulated at once with a single button press — no week-by-week engagement.
No roster viewer existed — the owner couldn't see their own players.
Roster management was absent — no ability to cut or sign players during or between seasons.
The offseason was a single silent function call with a brief summary popup.
The UI was a single scrolling page instead of an organized tab layout.

delegation_events.decision: Container-based refresh pattern over @ui.refreshable decorator for complex nested tab panels
delegation_events.quote: This container-based refresh pattern was chosen over NiceGUI's @ui.refreshable decorator because it handles complex nested tab panels more reliably — a lesson learned from the NVL Pro Leagues implementation.

delegation_events.decision: Compute-then-present pattern for multi-step offseason wizard — run_offseason() executes once, results stored, wizard presents results interactively
delegation_events.quote: Rather than decomposing the run_offseason() engine method into separate step-by-step calls (which would have been a risky refactor of complex interdependent logic), the wizard uses a compute-then-present pattern.

actions.description: Restructured WVL page into 5 tabs: Dashboard, My Team, Schedule, League, Finances
Five new WVLDynasty methods: get_owner_roster(), cut_player(), sign_free_agent(), get_owner_team_summary(), get_available_free_agents()
8-step offseason wizard with compute-then-present pattern using app.storage.user
CVL graduate pipeline: auto-detect cached graduates, pass as import_data to run_offseason(), preview table, custom JSON import

validation_claims.claim: Syntax validation: both wvl_mode.py and wvl_dynasty.py pass py_compile checks. Method verification: all 5 new WVLDynasty methods confirmed present via import assertion. Server startup: application starts cleanly with no errors.
validation_claims.check_method: Run py_compile on wvl_mode.py and wvl_dynasty.py; import assertion for 5 new methods; start server

validation_claims.claim: Architect code review: 3 critical issues identified and resolved (bounds checking, defensive defaults, import refresh).
validation_claims.check_method: Review code for _wvl_offseason_step bounds clamping, offseason_data isinstance check, import refresh trigger

non_actions.item: Custom imports are in-memory only — don't persist through page reload
non_actions.reason: A future enhancement could serialize custom imports into dynasty state.

non_actions.item: No mid-season trading system between clubs
No scouting system — all FA ratings shown openly
non_actions.reason: A future scouting mechanic could reveal ratings progressively based on scouting investment.

non_actions.item: No depth chart reordering by drag-and-drop
President hiring/firing UI — president card visible but no interactive hire/fire flow
non_actions.reason: Presidents are auto-assigned at dynasty creation.

non_actions.item: Season history browser — no dedicated season archive with historical standings, champions, player awards across multiple years

section_headers_original: WVL Owner Mode Upgrade — Project Report
unmapped_content: Date: March 3, 2026. Commits: 558d488, 99817ec. Files Modified: nicegui_app/pages/wvl_mode.py (1,603 lines), engine/wvl_dynasty.py (641 lines), replit.md. 8-step offseason wizard steps: 1 Season Recap, 2 Promotion & Relegation, 3 Retirements, 4 Player Import, 5 Free Agency, 6 Development, 7 Investment, 8 Financial Summary. WVLDynasty methods table: get_owner_roster() falls back to _current_season if _team_rosters empty; cut_player() enforces min 30; sign_free_agent() enforces max 40; _fa_pool non-persisted field. Code Quality issues resolved: step index bounds checking (_wvl_offseason_step clamped); offseason data validation isinstance(dict); defensive defaults data.get('key') or {}; custom import refresh triggered. Zone coloring: green=promotion, amber=playoff, red=relegation, indigo=owner's team.
parser_notes: Document titled 'Project Report' not AAR — genre_confidence medium. Date confirmed: March 3, 2026. 'Known Limitations & Future Work' maps to non_actions.
